    "Calibration sheet data indicates an out-of-tolerance zero vs. span error (span shift or zero shift) exceeding allowable limits.",
    "Instrument is operating in-service with uncorrected calibration drift, compromising process control accuracy."

  "actions": [
    "Isolate the instrument from the process following site safety and permit procedures.",

  "rationale": "The calibration sheet documentation (FD+DOC) reveals a systematic zero or span error that exceeds the maximum permissible error (MPE) defined by site QC and ISA standards. Because the instrument is currently in-service, this out-of-tolerance condition represents a failure to maintain calibration accuracy, requiring immediate recalibration or replacement.",
